rules.title: disable dead key backtick on Swedish layout

to.shell_command: /opt/homebrew/bin/paneru send-cmd window nextdisplay && /opt/homebrew/bin/paneru send-cmd mouse nextdisplay

rules.title: Caps lock to cmd / ctrl, escape when used alone
Disable repeat for ctrl-c and ctrl-d in terminals
Emoji picker (actual binding in raycast settings)
Key right of ä (macbook) and above enter on external keyboard TO slash and backslash
Kitty sets left option to alt so make tilde work like usual
slower repeat for spacebar and backspace
